rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in valid AADL scopes: component type for assumptions/guarantees, implementation for bindings.
Use component type scopes for port-based assumptions and guarantees; use implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL structural integrity when inserting AGREE annexes.
Validate that all referenced ports and components exist in the target AADL model before insertion.
Ensure AGREE expressions align with AADL data types and port directions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; implementation annexes are for assignments.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
Model analyst extraction of AADL structure
